chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1244 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7995/2024 (C/A) 16-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Abid Saleem Qureshi, Commissioner Sukkur Division and Nadir Shahzad Khan, Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur, Muhammad Hajjan Ujjan, ADC-II and Naheed Ahmed Mirani, ADC-I, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Abid Saleem Qureshi, Commissioner Sukkur Division, Sukkur and Nadir Shahzad Khan, Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur present in Court and submitted that they have issued appointment order to the Petitioner in compliance of this Court’s order; however, the Petitioner himself has refused to receive the same. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner, therefore, the listed Contempt Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
